templates: Hey {first_name}, it's {owner_name} from {business_name}. Saw your enquiry about scoping call. What problem made this land on your desk this week? Quick call today?
Hi {first_name}, thanks for reaching out about scoping call. Who else is involved in the decision (procurement, IT, finance)? Got 5 minutes to chat?
{first_name}, {owner_name} here from {business_name}. Re your scoping call enquiry: Is this budgeted this quarter or next? What's a good time?
